name: source_fingerprint
value: PropellerArchiveSourceFingerprint identifies the external archive and entry hashes before reviewed import.

value: PropellerArchiveCompactReferenceTable supplies blocked or reviewed compact propeller reference rows.

value: PropellerArchiveRotorSpecFitBridge converts compact rows into RotorSpec candidate units.

name: runtime_boundary
value: RotorSpec fit bridge never enables runtime coupling or gameplay auto apply.
